title: Add Google Docs/Monday Docs to the files section so that they show up in the Files Gallery
excerpt: When I create a files gallery view for my Monday Board, the only files that show up are the ones uploaded from my computer harddrive. None of my Google Drive files or even my Monday Docs show up in the files gallery. In …

posts.author: JennieSunflower (Jennie)
posts.cookedHtml: When I create a files gallery view for my Monday Board, the only files that show up are the ones uploaded from my computer harddrive. None of my Google Drive files or even my Monday Docs show up in the files gallery. In addition, while I can add all types of files to a files column, when I open the updates for an item, I can only add files from my harddrive. I find it frustrating that I’m trying to keep my files for associated tasks all in one place so that they are easily accessible, and yet Monday won’t show all my files without me having to search through the columns. This seems to be the opposite of streamlined task management. Please add capability for Google Files and Work docs to have equality with uploaded files.

posts.author: stacey45 (stacey marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, Monday.com’s Files Gallery doesn’t display Google Drive or Monday Docs files. As a workaround, use the Card widget or explore third-party integrations.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jennie,

Our Advanced File Gallery app helps with this issue. You will see not only files directly uploaded to items on a board, but also monday workdocs and links to external resources, such as Google Drive (so it include Google Docs too!). Maybe you want to give it a try?
